heading: Headquarters, principal office, and meetings
label: 220508 Headquarters, principal office, and meetings
text: The corporation shall maintain its principal office and national headquarters in a place in the United States decided by the corporation. The corporation may hold its annual and special meetings in the places decided by the corporation.

L. 95–606, § 1(a)(3)92 Stat. 3045Nov. 8, 1978The word “decided” is substituted for “as is determined” and for “shall determine” for consistency in the revised title.
